retrieved_result: A Guide To Quality Adjusted Life Years What is this factsheet about? This factsheet explains how the Scottish Medicines Consortium (SMC) uses a tool called the Quality Adjusted Life Year (QALY) to decide whether or not a medicine is value for money for the NHS in Scotland. Medicines can prolong life, improve the quality of life, or both.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses QALYs and NHS funding, unrelated to TikTok trends.

history.description: What is this factsheet about? This factsheet explains how the Scottish Medicines Consortium (SMC) uses a tool called the Quality Adjusted Life Year (QALY) to decide whether or not a medicine is value for money for the NHS in Scotland. Medicines can prolong life, improve the quality of life, or both.
